# Support

## Where to ask questions

- **GitHub Issues** — open an issue with the `question` label for usage questions or setup help.
- **GitHub Discussions** — for open-ended conversations, ideas, or "how do I..." questions that aren't bugs.

Before opening an issue, check the [Troubleshooting](../README.md#troubleshooting) section of the README — it covers the most common problems.

## This is a hobbyist project

pi-travel-router is maintained by one person in spare time. Support is best-effort. Response times vary; please be patient and provide as much detail as possible (hardware revision, OS version, how you installed, relevant logs from `travel-diagnostic`).

Pull requests for bug fixes and documentation improvements are always welcome.
